items.briefing:
Australian hospitals and healthcare organisations are being encouraged to strengthen their cyber resilience, with Rubrik and MEDITECH announcing a partnership focused on protecting hospital data and ensuring recovery after incidents. Separately, Darwinium has updated its mobile tools to better detect scam activity targeting users — relevant as scams continue to be a significant threat to Australians.

Cybersecurity products with AI-driven capabilities are expanding in the Australian market, with new distribution and platform updates from several vendors. If your organisation ever experiences a data breach, having a clear response plan ready in advance is critical.

**Tip:** Make sure your team knows who to contact internally if they suspect a data breach — don't wait for an incident to figure out your response process.

featured.title: WFI says only a quarter of Australian farmers are considering cyber insurance
featured.quote: Only 25% of Australian farmers consider cyber insurance, exposing critical food supply infrastructure.
